metadata.description: Claude Code plugins by XeicuLy — task planning, GitHub Issue implementation, and PR review workflows

plugins.name: task-planner
plugins.description: Structured feature planning workflow: requirement clarification → codebase exploration → design comparison → task decomposition → GitHub Issue creation. Enforces phase gates with user approval at each step.

plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: GitHub Issue implementation and PR review comment resolution workflows with TDD enforcement. Delegates to feature-dev 7-Phase Workflow and replies to each PR comment individually after implementation.
